overview: A professional Steel Plant Store Web ERP for managing inventory, material inward/issue transactions, purchasing, repair tracking, machine history, and reporting. Role-based access for Admin, Store User, Purchase User, and Manager.
features: Role-based login with 4 roles (Admin, Store User, Purchase User, Manager)
Dashboard with 8 live KPI cards and 3 trend charts
Item Master with full CRUD, photo upload, and technical specs
Material Inward (GRN) with auto stock increase and supplier ledger
Material Issue with 3 issue types and auto stock decrease
8 report types with Excel and PDF export
Admin Settings: users, roles, categories, company profile, audit logs
